evidence_purpose: Substantiation requirements for permitted health and wellness benefit claims in advertising.
summary: Health benefit claims require substantiation aligned with product regulatory classification and permitted claim list.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Health or wellness benefit language on supplement or food ad. ACTION: Check product class and permitted claims. CHECK: Substantiation file, ingredient dosage. ESCALATE IF: Disease or cure implication.

checks: Confirm product regulatory category permits claim
Verify substantiation matches ingredient and dosage
reject_if: Claim exceeds permitted health claim list
